columns.biomass_volume: ind.sum(0.0673 * (dens_bois.value * (dhp1 + dhp2 + dhp3 + dhp4 + dhp5 + dhp6 + dhp7 + dhp8 + dhp9 + dhp10)^2 * haut)^0.976 if etat = 1) / (20^2 * pi() / 10000) / 1000
columns.epf_necromass_pied: ind.sum(0.0673 * (dens_bois_mort.dens_bois * (dhp1 + dhp2 + dhp3 + dhp4 + dhp5 + dhp6 + dhp7 + dhp8 + dhp9 + dhp10)^2 * haut)^0.976 if etat = 2)
columns.epf_necromass_sol: ind.sum(3.1415926535 / 3 * ((dhp_b / 2)^2 + ((dhp_e / 2)^2 + dhp_b / 2 + dhp_e / 2) * longueur * dens_bois_mort.dens_bois) if etat = 3)
columns.epf_deadWood: ((ind.sum(0.0673 * (dens_bois_mort.dens_bois * (dhp1 + dhp2 + dhp3 + dhp4 + dhp5 + dhp6 + dhp7 + dhp8 + dhp9 + dhp10)^2 * haut)^0.976 if etat = 2) + ind.sum(pi() / 3 * ((dhp_b / 2)^2 + ((dhp_e / 2)^2 + dhp_b / 2 + dhp_e / 2) * longueur * dens_bois_mort.dens_bois) if etat = 3)) / ind.sum(0.0673 * (dens_bois.value * (dhp1 + dhp2 + dhp3 + dhp4 + dhp5 + dhp6 + dhp7 + dhp8 + dhp9 + dhp10)^2 * haut)^0.976 if etat = 1)) * 10
columns.epf_diameter_distribution: ind.gini(dhp1 + dhp2 + dhp3 + dhp4 + dhp5 + dhp6 + dhp7 + dhp8 + dhp9 + dhp10) * 10
columns.soil_structure: sum(ep1*int(not1) + ep2*int(not2) + ep3*int(not3) + ep4*int(not4) + ep5*int(not5)) / (sum(ep1 + ep2 + ep3 + ep4 + ep5) if sum(ep1 + ep2 + ep3 + ep4 + ep5) > 0 else 1) * 2
columns.ero_water_seepage: 600 * 300 / ((beer1 + beer2 + beer3 + beer4 + beer5 + beer6 + beer7 + beer8 + beer9 + beer10) * pi() * 30^2) if beer1 != 0 else 0
columns.surface_fauna_diversity: list_unique(list_concat(list(barba_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbA, tax2_barbA, tax3_barbA)), list(barbb_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbB, tax2_barbB, tax3_barbB)), list(barbc_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbC, tax2_barbC, tax3_barbC)), list(barbd_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbD, tax2_barbD, tax3_barbD))))
columns.surface_fauna_abundance: list_aggregate(list_concat(list(barba_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbA, tax2_barbA, tax3_barbA)), list(barbb_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbB, tax2_barbB, tax3_barbB)), list(barbc_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbC, tax2_barbC, tax3_barbC)), list(barbd_001.concat_ws('-', tax1_barbD, tax2_barbD, tax3_barbD))), 'histogram')
